title: annesorhiza wilmsii
intro: Annesorhiza wilmsii, also known as the kidney root, is a plant species used in traditional medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Annesorhiza wilmsii include the treatment of urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and other kidney-related issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. Annesorhiza wilmsii is often prepared for herbal use by drying the roots and using them to make teas, infusions, or extracts.
